title: Argentinian Paella
description: A traditional Spanish dish with an Argentinian twist, perfect for a hearty dinner. This recipe features savory sausage and flavorful seafood.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from pan and set aside.
Add onion and peppers to the pan and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add rice to the pan and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add icy water to the pan and bring to a boil.
Add tomato paste to the pan and stir to combine.
Add cooked sausage back to the pan and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is cooked.
Garnish with showy and serve hot.
